title: Craftable End Portal Frames!
description:
A way to craft the end portal frame!
This is a hard recipe!
body:
This is a datapack that allows you to craft the end portal frames!
The recipe is hard so put yourself to the challenge of making a full portal!

Consider checking out my [carrd.co](https://itztiger.carrd.co/)!

[![CurseForge link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3494a91b8d02c32063e94ab08f6dd796b5bb4634.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/craftable-end-portal-frames) [![Planet Minecraft Link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6da1310cd0843c9c599870318ccde9ebfc951305_0.webp)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/craftable-end-portal-frame/)


[![Available as a mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfdb7371316e7d975fca208bd6fde270afd284a7.png)](https://modrinth.com/project/craftable-end-portal-frames!-(mod))

ℹ️ Note: All releases from release 1.21.10 are backwards compatible upto version 1.19 of minecraft.

THANK YOU SOOO MUCH FOR 1,200+ DOWNLOADS!!!!!!!!
